name: agent-native-speech
description: Talk to your AI agent over Discord voice channels. Provides voice call tools for initiating conversations, speaking, and listening via STT/TTS with automatic word correction.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for STT word correction

DISCORD_CHANNEL_ID.description: Default Discord voice channel ID to join (can be overridden per call)

WHISPER_DEVICE.description: Compute device for Whisper (cuda or cpu)

WHISPER_COMPUTE_TYPE.description: Compute type for Whisper (float16 or float32)

TTS_DEVICE.description: Compute device for TTS (cuda or cpu)

SILENCE_DURATION_MS.description: Silence duration in milliseconds to end user utterance (VAD)

CORRECTION_MODEL.description: Claude model for STT word correction
